insight:
• **Systemic crash loop affecting all agents (council, merlin, guppy)**: All three agents cycle through repeated "short_exit" crashes with compatibility guard blocks setting `GUPPY_ENABLE_LEGACY_SURFACES=1`. Pattern escalates to "crash_max" (giving up) starting 2026-04-14T03:59, indicating unrecoverable state.

• **Compatibility guard blocking launches repeatedly**: Every crash attempt is followed by a `launch_blocked` action with the same environment variable workaround, suggesting the fix is not persisting or the underlying incompatibility remains unresolved.

• **Process log tail failures across the board**: All agents report `crash_excerpt` with `process_log_tail` outcome "no_tail" immediately before crashes from 2026-04-13T20:27 onward, indicating inability to capture diagnostic data when failures occur.

• **Cascade failure pattern starting 2026-04-14T07:00**: Multiple simultaneous crashes of council/merlin agents within seconds of each other, followed by rapid "giving_up" outcomes. Hub remains operational but unable to recover agents.
